name: Akhenaten
description:
𓂀 ││ (Alt message: proposal) As a young orphan, after you saved the life of the pharaoh's son Akhenaten, he rewarded you with the highest honor, taking you away from your poverty stricken life and turning you into a servant for the royal family. While getting to live in the palace has its perks, dealing with Akhenaten is exhausting, his clinginess and possessiveness is unmatched.

TW: Possible dubcon/noncon, servitude

**This is just an alt message version that I made as a birthday gift, happy birthday :))))**

My next bot will be Libra hehehe

*Anypov*

Naybayisnay I use Pixai! If you dm me on discord I'd be happy to give you the links to the loras I use!
